The '''Model AXM-50 "Blast and Smash"''', or '''Prax "Blast and Smash" Energy Rifle''', was an over-under, twin-barreled weapon designed by [[Prax Arms/Legends|Prax Arms]]. The AXM-50 combined a [[Drearian Defense Conglomerate/Legends|Drearian Defense Conglomerate]] rapid-fire [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] with a modified [[Locris Syndicates/Legends|Locris Syndicates]] [[Micro-grenade launcher/Legends|micro-grenade launcher]] underneath. A [[bipod]] could be attached to increase accuracy.<ref name="GG10" />
